EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway did not move an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} to KATA Quarantine on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected no virus or malware in an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected no phishing mailing in an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected no dangerous attachment in an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected no violation in an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}
